step.title: Check completeness
step.action: Verify all required PRD sections are present: Requirements (FR-xxx), NFRs (NFR-xxx), Acceptance Criteria, In Scope, Out of Scope.

step.title: Check traceability
step.action: Verify every functional requirement traces back to a feature or goal in the product brief.

step.title: Check testability
step.action: Verify every acceptance criterion is specific, measurable, and testable.

step.title: Report results
step.action: If all checks pass: report PASS with summary. Route to create-ux.
If issues found: report FAIL with specific issues listed. Route to edit-prd.
